level.description: Which evaluation level this formula uses.

expression.description: The formula expression. Required when level is template or dsl. For template: a string with {variable} placeholders. For dsl: an Excel-like formula string (must begin with =).

functionId.description: UUID of the function item to delegate to. Required when level is function.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this formula computes and any non-obvious behaviour.
